Oracc: Rīm-Anum Corpus — The House of Prisoners

UF 10, 152 26[via rimanum]

Obverse
o 1o 1

2(BARIG) ZI₃ US₂ / a-na GEŠBUN

(o 1) 120 liters of lesser-quality flour for the ŋešbun-allocation of the man of Dunnum and dependents.

o 22

LU₂ ⸢du⸣-un-nu-umki

o 33

[u₃] a-ḫi-a-tim / ZI.GA

(o 3) Issued at the house of prisoners of war.

Reverse
r 1r 1

ŠA₃ E₂ A.SI.RUM

r 22

NIG₂.ŠU dEN.ZU-še-mi

(r 2) Under the authority of Sîn-šeme.

r 33

itiKIN.dINANNA U₄ 2-KAM

(r 3) RīA 2/vi/2.

r 44

mu ri-im-an lugal

r 55

unugki-ga [u₃ a₂-dam-bi]

Seal illegible
